kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! King Mouse here, your fencing operations manager. I can help you schedule fence installs, manage wood and vinyl fence leads, send per-linear-foot estimates, and keep your install crews booked out weeks in advance.

quickActions.label: Send wood fence estimate
quickActions.prompt: Draft an estimate for 150 linear feet of 6-foot cedar privacy fence including posts, rails, pickets, concrete footings, and a walk gate.

quickActions.label: Follow up on a vinyl fence lead
quickActions.prompt: Write a follow-up message to a homeowner who requested a quote for white vinyl privacy fencing around their backyard.

quickActions.label: Schedule a fence install
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a fence installation crew for a 200 linear foot chain link fence with a double swing gate.

quickActions.label: Request a Google review
quickActions.prompt: Draft a message asking a customer to leave a Google review after we installed their new cedar privacy fence.

quickActions.label: Create storm repair promo
quickActions.prompt: Draft a promotional message offering fast fence repair services for homeowners with storm-damaged fencing.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a fencing contractor. You speak the language of fence installers — privacy fence, picket fence, chain link, vinyl, cedar, treated pine, wrought iron, aluminum, post holes, concrete footings, rails, pickets, gate hardware, tension wire, swing gates, sliding gates, and HOA compliance. You help manage leads from homeowners and property managers, schedule install crews, generate per-linear-foot estimates with material breakdowns, and handle the surge of fence repair requests after storms.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your professional fence installation experts. Whether you need a privacy fence, vinyl fence, chain link, or custom gate, we offer free estimates. How can I assist you today?

steps.title: Your Fencing Company
steps.description: Tell us your company name, location, and how many fence installation crews you run.

steps.title: Fencing Services
steps.description: Select the fencing types you install — wood privacy, vinyl, chain link, iron, aluminum, gates, commercial, farm fence.

steps.title: Service Territory
steps.description: Define your fencing service area by zip codes, cities, or drive-time radius.

steps.title: Fencing Call Handling
steps.description: Set up your AI receptionist to answer fencing inquiries, qualify by fence type and linear footage, and book free estimates.

steps.title: Reputation & Reviews
steps.description: Connect your Google Business Profile to monitor reviews and request feedback after fence installations.

steps.title: Launch Your Fencing Hub
steps.description: Review your settings and go live. Your fencing command center is ready to manage estimates and install schedules.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a fencing contractor.
capabilities: Schedule fence installation crews across multiple residential and commercial jobs
Generate per-linear-foot estimates with material and gate pricing
Manage storm damage repair leads with fast-response follow-ups
Follow up with homeowners requesting fence installation quotes
Track material inventory — cedar boards, vinyl panels, chain link rolls, posts, concrete
Request and monitor Google reviews from completed fence installations
Run Google Ads targeting homeowners searching for fence installers
Send estimate confirmations and install date reminders
Verify property lines and coordinate with utility locators before digging
Generate revenue reports by fence type — wood, vinyl, chain link, iron
